frontmatter.title: everything you ever wanted to know about the computer vision
frontmatter.summary: One of the most powerful and compelling types of AI is computer vision which you’ve almost surely experienced in any number of ways without even knowing. Here’s a look at what it is, how it works, and why it’s so awesome (and is only going to get better).

frontMatter.title: The Master Theorem For Time Complexity
frontMatter.summary: In this article, we will model the time complexity of divide and conquer using mathematical methods, analyze its asymptotic properties, and provide three methods of calculation.
